result.summary: District exposes a public website and one known OAuth-protected MCP server at https://mcp-server.district.in/mcp; no public developer HTTP/GraphQL APIs or CLI were found.
result.description: District is a consumer platform for discovering and booking movies, events, dining, and sports activities. Its public site is district.in, and it also operates an MCP server on a separate subdomain.

district_mcp_oauth.label: District MCP OAuth client/app
district_mcp_oauth.setup: For the District MCP server, register an OAuth client at [District MCP client registration](https://mcp-server.district.in/register), then complete the authorization-code flow against the server's OAuth metadata at [authorization server metadata](https://mcp-server.district.in/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server). The metadata advertises `authorization_endpoint` `https://mcp-server.district.in/authorize`, `token_endpoint` `https://mcp-server.district.in/token`, and supports `authorization_code` plus `refresh_token` with PKCE `S256`.
